title: The Reason for Mazyar's Open Rebellion against al-Mu'tasim and His Severe Measures with the People of the Plain
description: The Reason for Mazyar's Open Rebellion against al-Mu'tasim and His Severe Measures with the People of the Plain. Recorded under the year 223 AH (838–839 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 33.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 33
